articles.title: Falk: Milan express interest in Goretzka as free agent confirmation approaches
articles.summary: AC Milan are keen to act on mercato opportunities, and signing Leon Goretzka would certainly fall into that bracket, especially with him available for free this summer. articles.title: Italy, Chiesa leaves the national team retreat: Cambiaghi is called in his place
articles.summary: (ANSA) - ROME, MARCH 23 - Federico Chiesa leaves the national team retreat. Having checked his physical condition once he arrived at the Federal Technical Centre, he was deemed unavailable for the next two matches.

articles.title: Milan transfer market: Tare and Allegri have already identified a shortlist of midfielders ready for use
articles.summary: In view of next season, with Milan expected to return to playing the Champions League, there has been a meeting in recent days between Massimiliano Allegri and the Rossoneri management to start planning the summer transfer market.

For a while, it has been stated that Milan would have a meeting with Allegri towards the end of the season. Indeed, since the talk

articles.title: Milan, Loftus-Cheek will be on the bench in Naples thanks to a particular protection that he will use for his mouth
articles.summary: Ruben Loftus-Cheek will be on the bench when the championship resumes in Milan's match on the Napoli pitch.

articles.title: Transfer market summit: the guidelines that emerged from the meeting. 4-3-3, Leao and comeback: everything passes through Naples
articles.summary: Inter's draw against Fiorentina has rekindled, between Milan and Naples, that spark of hope for a Scudetto comeback which, frankly speaking, I still see as very complicated for both the Rossoneri and the Azzurri.

articles.title: Il Giornale headline: "Fullkrug flop, returned to sender"
articles.summary: Il Giornale on newsstands this morning has the headline: "Fullkrug flop, returned to sender".

articles.title: Allegri already better than Fonseca and Conceiçao after 30 matchdays: the positive numbers of his Milan to try a sensational comeback
articles.summary: The weekend that has just ended has changed the scenarios of the championship race quite a bit. Inter drew in Florence and now Milan find themselves -6 in the standings.

articles.title: GdS: Allegri charges to Naples to scare Chivu – why the Scudetto dream remains alive
articles.summary:
This weekend, the Scudetto picture took another turn, and it appears that there may be some belief growing inside the walls of AC Milan. Indeed, after the loss to Lazio – perhaps even the X against Parma – many believed that the title was out of the picture. That may still be the belief for […]

articles.title: MN - Milanello, training resumes on Wednesday afternoon
articles.summary: After beating Torino on Saturday at San Siro, Massimiliano Allegri granted a few days' rest to those Rossoneri players who will not be playing for the national team during this break.

articles.title: Portugal, Leao will not respond to the call for Mexico and USA. In his place Paulinho
articles.summary: Rafael Leao missed Milan's match against Torino on Saturday due to an adductor problem. Tests have fortunately ruled out injuries, but the player will not be able to respond to Portugal's call-up.

articles.summary: In the match against Torino, Santiago Gimenez was also back on the pitch, 144 days after the last time. Today's edition of Corriere dello Sport talks about it: "Gimenez remains at Milanello to relaunch himself after the knockout".

articles.title: CorSera: "Milan believes in it again. With Rabiot I can win the championship"
articles.summary: "Milan believe in it again. With Rabiot they pass the Scudetto": this is the headline in this morning's Corriere della Sera which explains that at Milanello they have once again believed in the sensational comeback of the Scudetto.

articles.title: Towards Napoli, Gazzetta: "Loftus-Cheek ok. Leao and Gabbia remain in doubt"

articles.title: CorSport on Milan's numbers: "Armored at the Max".

articles.title: CorSera: "Inter, only a draw. Milan is now -6"
articles.summary: Has the championship race reopened? If until a few weeks ago the scenario seemed to be settled, Inter's draw against Fiorentina has opened up new dynamics for a final rush of the championship that could be sensational.

articles.title: The opening QS: "New Devil, usual certainties"
articles.summary: Inter drew against Fiorentina and reopened a scenario that was well addressed until a few weeks ago. Now Milan is still lurking and can hope to reopen a fight that now seemed closed.

articles.title: Tuttosport on Allegri's plans: "More Rabiot are needed for Euro Milan"
